sn45.31:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you wrong practice and right practice. Listen to that … .
sn45.31:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is wrong practice? It is: wrong view …. wrong concentration. This is called wrong practice.
sn45.31:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, is right practice? It is: right view … right concentration. This is called right practice."
